nodes.label: Content rules (standing, for any agent editing copy)
nodes.norm_label: content rules (standing, for any agent editing copy)

nodes.label: bdavis.ai Personal Site
nodes.rationale: Spare, technical, single-column personal site built with Astro and deployed to Cloudflare Pages; a deliberate, minimal public projection.

nodes.label: Minimal Public Projection Content Rules
nodes.rationale: No personal-life details and no infrastructure inventory beyond what existing copy names; current copy is the ceiling, not a floor.

nodes.label: Resume Sync Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Cloudflare's build cannot see ~/.dotfiles, so content.yaml and resume.pdf are vendored into the repo via npm run sync-resume; page and PDF stay in lockstep.

nodes.label: Fleet-Viz Panel
nodes.rationale: Preact island hydrated client:visible so the rest of the page ships zero JS; shows five homelab machines by role only (no hostnames, IPs, or topology) per the scarcity rule.

nodes.label: Preact 4.1.3 Version Pin
nodes.rationale: @astrojs/preact pinned to 4.1.3 (no caret): newer releases require Vite 7/8 which conflicts with Astro 5.18's bundled Vite 6.4.x and breaks the build.

nodes.label: Cloudflare Pages Auto-Deploy
nodes.rationale: Project bdavis-ai is git-connected; pushing main auto-builds and deploys. Started as Direct Upload, so pushes silently did nothing until 2026-07-10; manual wrangler deploy remains the fallback.

nodes.label: graphify Query-First Rule
nodes.rationale: For codebase questions, run graphify query/path/explain before raw grep; run graphify update after code changes to keep the graph current.

nodes.label: graphify Build Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Turns any folder into a navigable knowledge graph: detect, AST + semantic extraction, build/cluster, community labeling, HTML export, manifest/cost tracking.

nodes.label: graphify Honesty Rules
nodes.rationale: Never invent an edge (use AMBIGUOUS), always show token cost, show raw cohesion scores, warn before visualizing >5000 nodes.

nodes.label: Extraction Subagent Spec
nodes.rationale: Defines the JSON schema, full-path node-ID rule, EXTRACTED/INFERRED/AMBIGUOUS confidence rubric, and vision rules for semantic extraction.

nodes.label: Query, Path and Explain Flows
nodes.rationale: Constrained vocab expansion before BFS/DFS traversal; save-result feedback loop with useful/dead_end/corrected outcomes.

nodes.label: Resume Content Store
nodes.rationale: Single source of truth: every summary fragment, bullet, project, and skill group is tagged by theme and strength so render.py can assemble a role-framed one-page resume per profile without hand-editing LaTeX.

nodes.label: Bradley Allan Davis
nodes.rationale: AI-Native Senior Software Engineer; 7+ years of backend, distributed-systems, and payments work now layered with MCP servers and agentic workflows.

nodes.label: OKX Fiat Payments Platform Role
nodes.rationale: Senior Software Engineer, Mar 2022 - May 2026: reconciliation engines, fee-calculation service, shared payments library, AI-assisted development adoption.

nodes.label: Intuit QuickBooks Webhooks Role
nodes.rationale: Software Engineer, Feb 2019 - Feb 2022: webhooks infrastructure handling 10-20M daily notifications at 99.9% reliability.

nodes.label: Project Catalyst Monolith Decomposition
nodes.rationale: The platform's largest architectural effort: decomposed the payment-orchestration monolith into five independently deployable modules with semver-governed contracts.

nodes.label: Theme Tag Vocabulary
nodes.rationale: Closed tag list (ai-native, backend, distributed-systems, infra, leadership, payments, devex) plus 1-5 strength; profiles weight these to select content.

nodes.label: Rendered Resume PDF
nodes.rationale: One-page AltaCV-rendered resume for Bradley Allan Davis (default profile); same content as the YAML store, served as the download on /resume.

nodes.label: bd Monogram Favicon
nodes.rationale: Rounded square with monospace 'bd' text in Solarized colors (base03 #002b36 background, cyan #2aa198 text) - the site brand mark.

nodes.label: Headshot 176px JPEG
nodes.rationale: Professional headshot of Bradley Davis: smiling man with short hair and beard, black t-shirt, gray studio backdrop.
